name: app_info
description: Report the Laravel app's PHP version, Laravel version, environment (APP_NAME/APP_ENV/APP_DEBUG), whether Telescope is installed, and the full list of installed composer packages with versions. Read from composer.lock and .env — no app boot required.

name: db_connections
description: Show the app's default database connection (driver, host, port, database, username; password masked), resolved from .env.

name: db_schema
description: Inspect the database schema by connecting directly. With no `table`, lists all tables. With `table`, returns its columns, indexes, and foreign keys. Supports mysql/mariadb, pgsql, and sqlite.

table.description: Table to describe. Omit to list all tables.

connection.description: Connection name from .env (default DB_CONNECTION). One of mysql, mariadb, pgsql, sqlite.

name: db_query
description: Run a READ-ONLY SQL query against the app's database and return rows. Only SELECT/SHOW/EXPLAIN/DESCRIBE/WITH/PRAGMA are allowed; any data-modifying statement is refused. Use this for live data; use `telescope` for historical query telemetry.

name: read_logs
description: Read recent entries from storage/logs/laravel.log (Monolog format, multi-line stack traces grouped). Optionally filter by level.

level.description: Filter by level, e.g. ERROR, WARNING, INFO, DEBUG.

name: last_error
description: Return the most recent error-level entry (ERROR/CRITICAL/ALERT/EMERGENCY) from storage/logs/laravel.log, with its stack trace.

name: browser_logs
description: Read recent frontend/JS log lines from storage/logs/browser.log (if your app writes them there). Degrades cleanly when the file is absent.

name: routes
description: List the app's registered routes via `php artisan route:list --json`. Optionally filter by path, method, or route name (substring match).

method.description: Filter by HTTP method, e.g. GET, POST.

name: config
description: Read a Laravel config value by dotted key (e.g. "app.name", "database.connections", or a file name like "app"). Parses config/*.php natively (no PHP execution) and resolves env() against .env. Omit `key` to list available config files.

key.description: Dotted config key, or a config file name. Omit to list config files.

name: absolute_url
description: Build an absolute URL from APP_URL. Provide `path` for a raw path, or `route` for a named route's URI (no parameter substitution).

name: docs_search
description: Search version-specific Laravel-ecosystem documentation (boost.laravel.com). Sends the app's installed packages + major versions so results match the project. Returns markdown.

packages.description: Restrict to these composer package names (default: all installed).

token_limit.description: Max tokens of docs to return (default 3000).

name: tinker
description: Execute arbitrary PHP in the app context via `php artisan tinker --execute`. Returns stdout. Disabled by default; enable with LARAVEL_MCP_TINKER=1.

name: artisan
description: Run an allowlisted READ-ONLY artisan command and return its output (about, db:show, db:table, migrate:status, queue:failed, schedule:list, event:list, route:list, model:show, config:show, channel:list, env, ...). State-changing commands are refused; use `tinker` for those.

name: models
description: Discover Eloquent models by parsing the app's PHP (no execution). Scans app/, Modules/, app/Modules/, and src/ for model classes regardless of namespace/folder. Omit `model` for a summary list; pass a name or class substring for full table, fillable, guarded, casts, and relationships.

model.description: Model name or class substring for full detail. Omit to list all models.

name: telescope
description: Query Laravel Telescope telemetry directly from the telescope_entries table. Replaces the historical 'what happened' tools. Requires Telescope installed with the database storage driver; degrades with a clear message otherwise. With `id`, returns one entry's full content; otherwise lists recent entries of the given `type`.

id.description: Fetch one entry's full content by uuid.

slow.description: queries only: only those slower than 100ms.

since_hours.description: Only entries created within the last N hours.

tag.description: Only entries carrying this Telescope tag.

request_id.description: Filter by the originating request batch/uuid.

connection.description: Database connection to read Telescope from (default: Telescope's configured connection).

name: telescope_prune
description: Delete Telescope entries older than the given number of hours via `php artisan telescope:prune`. Mutating — confirm with the user first.

hours.description: Prune entries older than this many hours (default 24).
